dashboard.label: Approve Actions
dashboard.description: Approve or deny queued agent actions after investigation.

search.query: | agentsightapprove case_id="$approve_case_id$" action_id="$approve_action_id$" decision="$approve_decision$" actor="$env:user$" | table _time status case_id action_id action_type decision new_case_status tokens_revoked followup_sid message

html.p: Copy case_id and action_id from AgentSight dashboard → Pending Agent Actions, then click Submit.
Action types: spl runs an approved read-only follow-up; quarantine revokes the MCP agent's Splunk auth tokens and sets the case to contained.
